name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad with Honey Dress
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Cleaned and trimmed Fresh spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the cleaned and trimmed spinach into bite-sized pieces and place in a salad bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the balsamic vinegar, rice vinegar, water, honey, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Add the dressing to the spinach and toss lightly to coat.
4. Add the sliced strawberries and thinly sliced red onion to the salad.
5. Toss everything gently to combine.
